race.comment: BRITANNIA ROSE (15) broke the maiden status over this course and distance at the latest effort and winning rider Larson sticks in the irons. Will have taken some confidence from that victory and can go on with the job now. I'LLTELLYOUTONIGHT (16) has been going around in stronger races the city of late and hasn't been too far away. He lone win came at this track so she is better placed here. SUSSUSUDIO (14) boasts a win around this circuit and is better than recent efforts suggest. Worth another chance. ZHONGXIN KOALA (10) next in line in an open race to close out the card.
